title: Finnish Experiences of Loneliness 2020-2021
description: The dataset consists of self-administered written texts on experiences of loneliness. The participants wrote about their experiences with loneliness during different stages of their lives. The data was collected in collaboration with MIELI Mental Health Finland and HelsinkiMissio. The writing guidelines directed participants to write about their experiences of loneliness, the emotions elicited by those experiences, and their own relationship with loneliness.
